extortion.description: [AI generated] Michelin.com is the online platform for the Michelin Group, a leading tire company founded in 1889, based in Clermont-Ferrand, France. The company is renowned for his contribution to the tire industry, including the invention of the radial tire. Apart from manufacturing tires for various kinds of vehicles, Michelin also provides travel assistance, publishing maps and guides, and operates in more than 170 countries worldwide.
